name: io.github.machineread/mcp
title: MachineRead Essentials Audit MCP Server
description: Read-only MCP server exposing the free MachineRead Essentials audit to MCP-compatible agents. Anonymous, rate-limited, and free; no authentication or paid execution.
websiteUrlNote: Reserved future production domain; not yet live. The public source for this server card is the public repository under docs/api/.

io.machineread/server.launch: The MachineRead MCP server is maintained in the private product repository and is not part of the public preview.

tools.name: run_essentials_audit
tools.purpose: Execute a new Essentials audit against a public URL.

tools.name: get_audit_report
tools.purpose: Retrieve a cached audit by its audit_id (LRU 32 entries, in-process).

tools.name: list_available_checks
tools.purpose: Enumerate the 13 Essentials check groups with metadata.

tools.name: explain_check
tools.purpose: Return detailed rubric, sub-signals, finding examples, and fix examples for a specific check.

caveats: Free Essentials does not verify live DuckDuckGo or Bing ranking.
Free Essentials does not authenticate provider IP ranges.
Free Essentials does not call Firecrawl or any paid crawler.
Scores are relative public-readiness signals, not citation share, traffic, search ranking, social traction, conversion, or field Core Web Vitals.
io.machineread/server.logging: stderr-only with URL and token redaction; never logs customer URL contents
io.machineread/server.tool_outputs: structured {ok, data|error} envelopes with stable error codes: URL_TOO_LONG, URL_NOT_ALLOWED, INVALID_PRESET, RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED, AUDIT_SETUP_FAILED, AUDIT_NOT_FOUND, CHECK_NOT_FOUND
